zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Humphrey Blount於1423年出生在英國史洛普爾金萊特時，他的父親John Blount III39歲，母親Alice Alicia Maud Bere29歲。他於1445年與Lady Elizabeth Winnington在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1460年被列為sheriff of shropshire。他去世於1477年10月13日在他的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾金萊特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Humphrey Blount于1423年出生在英国史洛普爾金萊特时，他的父亲John Blount III39岁，母亲Alice Alicia Maud Bere29岁。他于1445年与Lady Elizabeth Winnington在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾伍斯特结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1460年被列为sheriff of shropshire。他去世于1477年10月13日在他的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾金萊特。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Humphrey Blount was born in 1423, in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, his father, John Blount III, was 39 and his mother, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, was 29. He married Lady Elizabeth Winnington in 1445, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. In 1460, his occupation is listed as sheriff of shropshire. He died on 13 October 1477, in his hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Kinlet, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Humphrey Blount est né en 1423, à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, John Blount III, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Winnington en 1445, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. En 1460, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of shropshire. Il est décédé le 13 octobre 1477, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.Barton Blount, Derbyshire, , England: Barton Blount, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Humphrey Blount 1423 in Kinlet, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Blount III 39 und seine Mutter Alice Alicia Maud Bere 29. Er hat 1445 in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Lady Elizabeth Winnington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1460 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of shropshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. Oktober 1477 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kinlet, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Blount è nato il nel 1423 nel Kinlet, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, John Blount III, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Winnington nel 1445, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1460, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of shropshire. Morì il 13 ottobre 1477, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Kinlet, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Blountが1423年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットで生まれた時，父John Blount IIIは39歳，母Alice Alicia Maud Bereは29歳であった。1445年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターでLady Elizabeth Winningtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1460年，職業はsheriff of shropshireと記録されている。彼は1477年10月13日に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Blount(이)가 1423년 영국 슈럽실르 킨렛에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Blount III(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Alicia Maud Bere(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 Lady Elizabeth Winnington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1460년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of shropshire이었다. 그는 1477년 10월 13일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 킨렛에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Blount nasceu em 1423, em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Blount III, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Winnington em 1445, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1460, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of shropshire. Ele faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1477, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Barton Blount, Derbyshire, , England: Barton Blount, Derbyshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Humphrey Blount родился в 1423 г. в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Blount III было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Alicia Maud Bere, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Winnington в 1445 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1460 году он работал по профессии sheriff of shropshire. Он умер 13 октября 1477 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Humphrey Blount nació en 1423, en Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Blount III, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Winnington en 1445, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1460, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of shropshire. Murió el 13 de octubre de 1477, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
